post_processing: Pillow JPEG re-encode (quality 76-78, progressive, optimize); hero downscaled to max-width 2000, solutions cards to max-width 1200

assets.prompt: Abstract architectural photograph for an institutional fintech landing page. Deep navy and graphite, with subtle indigo and teal highlights. A modern bank-vault interior reimagined: long perspective corridor, soft volumetric light from above, hint of brushed-metal partitions, no people, no text. Slightly cinematic, slightly cold, MAS regulator-grade. Wide 16:9 cinematic banner. No logos, no UI, no glass-panel mockups, no charts.

Editorial macro photo: a single transparent token-shaped acrylic disc resting on a dark slate desk under one warm overhead light, paperwork edge visible at frame margin. Deep navy plus warm amber accent. Institutional, calm, document-led. 4:3 aspect ratio, landscape orientation. No text, no logos, no UI.

Top-down editorial photo: a network of brushed-metal cables converging into a single hub on dark slate, soft directional lighting, no logos. Suggests routed flow, brokerage allocation. Deep navy plus cool steel. 4:3 aspect ratio, landscape orientation. No text, no UI.

Editorial photo of a worn institutional client portfolio binder open at an indexed page on a dark walnut desk, a fountain pen resting beside it, single warm desk-lamp light from upper-left. Suggests servicing, statements, audit. Deep brown plus warm cream. 4:3 aspect ratio, landscape orientation. No text, no logos, no UI.

Editorial wide-angle photograph of a minimalist institutional war-room interior. Long matte-black operations desk, three vertical monitor silhouettes (off, no on-screen content), soft volumetric daylight from a tall side window casting clean diagonal light beams, hint of brushed-steel acoustic partition, polished concrete floor. Deep navy and graphite tones with subtle warm-stone highlights. Mood: structured, MAS regulator-grade, suggests guided first-run onboarding. Wide 16:9 cinematic banner. No people, no logos, no text, no UI mockups, no charts.

Editorial architectural photograph of a stacked institutional ledger column. Tall column of horizontally layered marble and basalt slabs of varying tones (charcoal, pewter, warm-stone, single subtle amber band), receding diagonally into soft diffused light, single overhead beam catching one mid-stack slab. Deep graphite tones with warm amber accent. Mood: layered, transparent, tiered, suggests honest tiered commercial pricing. Wide 16:9 cinematic banner. No people, no logos, no text, no UI, no charts.

Editorial photograph of an institutional research library aisle at dusk. Long perspective corridor of tall walnut bookshelves filled with leather-bound volumes receding into deep shadow, single warm desk-lamp pool of light spilling onto a herringbone parquet floor in mid-frame, brass shelf tags catching the light. Deep brown and walnut tones with warm cream and amber accents. Mood: durable record, deep reference, suggests architecture and product documentation. Wide 16:9 cinematic banner. No people, no logos, no text, no UI, no charts.
